SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算条件")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")

FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算详细")

view.title:
可否开票填可以则有开票要求不可以则无
  定 金(万)（？--默认为0则不显示在结算方式,填充为数字）
（付款比例%--默认是100% ，0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（结算条件--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（结算详细--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（余款比例%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（余款见票%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充一般为数字）
（注：结算详细只能在下拉中选）

view.params:
PMC计划单
无

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="管理人数")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.pid)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="主营行业")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.xznr ASC

SELECT distinct dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.pid)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="主要市场")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.xznr ASC

FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="销售方式")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr,dxkzsheet.SID
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="价格区间")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cght.hthm,cght.SID
FROM cght
WHERE   (cght.cs_id=[工厂审批.厂商编号])
   AND  ((cght.gdry=:_user_username_)
   or  (cght.cgry=:_user_username_))
ORDER BY cght.SID desc
